summary: Iteration 95: All fixes verified successfully. LaundryManagement blank screen FIXED - page now renders correctly with Dashboard (7 Total Shops) and Management tabs showing shop cards with service badges. Cinema /films API route working (route order fix verified). Vite build completes without errors. All 5 result pages have duplicate isFav/toggleFav props fixed. Events Management page loads correctly with all tabs.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render

critical_code_review_comments: LaundryManagement.jsx correctly handles both string and object service formats with typeof checks at lines 253-254
Cinema /films route correctly placed at line 69 before /{cinema_id} at line 100 - verified working
All 5 result pages (LaundryResults, CinemaResults, EventsResults, PackagesResults, BanquetResults) have isFav/toggleFav props passed correctly without duplication
Vite build completes successfully (8.29s) - no errors, only chunk size warning (expected for large app)

success_rate.backend: 100% - All APIs working (pressing, cinema/films, events, packages, banquets)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - LaundryManagement, EventsManagement pages load correctly, Vite build passes

context_for_next_testing_agent: All fixes from iteration 94 have been verified. LaundryManagement page now renders correctly - the fix for handling services as objects (with name/type/price) instead of strings is working. The Management tab shows shop cards with service badges displaying correctly (e.g., 'Executive Shirt', 'Business Suit', 'Eco Wash (Per Kg)'). Cinema /films API returns films list. Events Management page loads with Dashboard/Management/Communications tabs. Vite build passes without errors.
